questions.question: Q151. I have _______ friends who can help me in this matter.
questions.explanation: "A few" is used for countable nouns like friends in a positive sense. "A few" का प्रयोग countable nouns के लिए सकारात्मक अर्थ में होता है।

questions.question: Q152. There is _______ hope of his recovery after the accident.
questions.explanation: "Little" is used for uncountable nouns like hope in a negative sense. "Little" का प्रयोग uncountable nouns के लिए नकारात्मक अर्थ (न के बराबर) में होता है।

questions.question: Q153. _______ money he had was stolen from his pocket.
questions.explanation: "The little" means 'not much, but all of it'. "The little" का अर्थ है 'जो कुछ भी थोड़ा बहुत है, वह सब'।

questions.question: Q154. Give me _______ water to quench my thirst.
questions.explanation: "A little" means some amount, used for uncountable nouns. "A little" का प्रयोग uncountable nouns के लिए 'थोड़ी मात्रा' के अर्थ में होता है।

questions.question: Q155. _______ students who were present attended the lecture.
questions.explanation: "The few" means 'all of the small number'. "The few" का अर्थ है 'जो थोड़े बहुत (संख्या में) थे, वे सब'।

questions.question: Q156. She has _______ knowledge of the subject, so she can't explain it.
questions.explanation: "Little" implies almost none, which fits the context of being unable to explain. "Little" का अर्थ है 'नगण्य', जो विषय न समझा पाने के संदर्भ में सही है।

questions.question: Q157. He works _______ so that he can provide for his family.
questions.explanation: "Hard" is an adverb meaning with great effort; "hardly" means 'scarcely'. "Hard" का अर्थ है 'कठिन परिश्रम', जबकि "hardly" का अर्थ 'मुश्किल से' होता है।

questions.question: Q158. I _______ know anyone in this new city.
questions.explanation: "Hardly" is used to mean 'almost not at all'. "Hardly" का प्रयोग 'लगभग न के बराबर' या 'बड़ी मुश्किल से' के अर्थ में होता है।

questions.question: Q159. He _______ comes to see his old parents nowadays.
questions.explanation: "Hardly" (or hardly ever) is used to show rarity of action. "Hardly" क्रिया की दुर्लभता (rarely) को दर्शाने के लिए उपयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q160. It is a _______ task to climb the steep mountain.
questions.explanation: Here "hard" is used as an adjective meaning difficult. यहाँ "hard" का प्रयोग adjective के रूप में 'कठिन' कार्य बताने के लिए हुआ है।

questions.question: Q161. This coffee is _______ hot for me to drink.
questions.explanation: "Too...to" structure is used to show an excess that leads to a negative result. "Too...to" का प्रयोग किसी चीज की अधिकता के नकारात्मक परिणाम के लिए होता है।

questions.question: Q162. The weather is _______ pleasant today for a walk.
questions.explanation: "Very" is used with positive qualities; "too" is used for unpleasant excess. "Very" का प्रयोग सुखद (pleasant) गुणों के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q163. He is _______ tired to walk any further.
questions.explanation: "Too" indicates an excessive degree that prevents an action. "Too" थकावट की उस अधिकता को बताता है जिसके कारण चलना संभव नहीं।

questions.question: Q164. This room is _______ small for twenty people.
questions.explanation: "Too" is used when something is more than what is required or desirable. "Too" का प्रयोग तब होता है जब कोई चीज आवश्यकता से अधिक (यहाँ अधिक छोटी) हो।

questions.question: Q165. He is intelligent _______ to solve this complex puzzle.
questions.explanation: "Enough" is placed after the adjective it modifies. "Enough" का प्रयोग हमेशा उस adjective के बाद होता है जिसकी वह विशेषता बताता है।

questions.question: Q166. She is _______ enough to handle the situation.
questions.explanation: "Enough" is preceded by the positive degree of the adjective. "Enough" से पहले हमेशा adjective की positive degree का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q167. He has _______ money to buy a new car.
questions.explanation: When used with a noun, "enough" comes before the noun. जब "enough" का प्रयोग noun (money) के साथ हो, तो यह noun से पहले आता है।

questions.question: Q168. You are not tall _______ to join the basketball team.
questions.explanation: Adjective (tall) + enough is the correct grammatical structure. Adjective (tall) के बाद "enough" का प्रयोग व्याकरणिक रूप से सही है।

questions.question: Q169. The tea is _______ hot.
questions.explanation: Use "very" for a high degree; "too" should ideally have a "to + V1" follow-up. सामान्यतः उच्च डिग्री बताने के लिए "very" का प्रयोग बेहतर होता है।

questions.question: Q170. It is _______ cold today to go out without a coat.
questions.explanation: "Too" is used here because the coldness is preventing the action of going out. यहाँ ठंड की अधिकता बाहर जाने से रोक रही है, इसलिए "too" सही है।

questions.question: Q171. My house is _______ to the station than yours.
questions.explanation: "Nearer" is the comparative degree used for comparing two distances. दो दूरियों की तुलना के लिए comparative degree "nearer" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q172. The pharmacy is _______ to the grocery store.
questions.explanation: "Next" refers to the adjacent position. "Next" का प्रयोग बगल वाली स्थिति (adjacent position) बताने के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q173. Who is sitting _______ to you in the classroom?
questions.explanation: "Next to" is a prepositional phrase meaning beside. "Next to" का अर्थ है 'बगल में' या 'पास में'।

questions.question: Q174. Which is the _______ police station from here?
questions.explanation: "Nearest" refers to the shortest distance in a group. सबसे कम दूरी (shortest distance) के लिए "nearest" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q175. I will see you in the _______ future.
questions.explanation: "Near future" is a standard expression. "Near future" (निकट भविष्य) एक मानक मुहावरा है।

questions.question: Q176. He _______ missed the train this morning.
questions.explanation: "Nearly" is an adverb meaning 'almost'. "Nearly" एक adverb है जिसका अर्थ है 'लगभग'।

questions.question: Q177. I don't have _______ information about the event.
questions.explanation: "Any" is used in negative sentences. नकारात्मक वाक्यों में "any" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q178. Would you like _______ coffee?
questions.explanation: "Some" is used in questions that are requests or offers. प्रार्थना या प्रस्ताव वाले प्रश्नों में "some" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q179. There are _______ books on the table.
questions.explanation: "Some" is used in positive (affirmative) sentences. सकारात्मक वाक्यों में "some" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q180. Have you got _______ doubt regarding this rule?
questions.explanation: "Any" is used in interrogative sentences. प्रश्नवाचक वाक्यों में "any" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q181. If you have _______ problems, let me know.
questions.explanation: In "if" clauses, "any" is generally preferred. "If" वाले वाक्यों में सामान्यतः "any" का प्रयोग बेहतर माना जाता है।

questions.question: Q182. I need _______ help with my homework.
questions.explanation: In a positive request for help, "some" is used. मदद माँगने वाले सकारात्मक वाक्य में "some" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q183. The two brothers quarreled with _______.
questions.explanation: "Each other" is used for two persons. दो व्यक्तियों के लिए "each other" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q184. The students of the class helped _______ during the project.
questions.explanation: "One another" is used for more than two persons. दो से अधिक व्यक्तियों के लिए "one another" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q185. Both teams played against _______ in the finals.
questions.explanation: For two teams or entities, "each other" is the correct choice. दो टीमों या संस्थाओं के लिए "each other" सही विकल्प है।

questions.question: 186. They all congratulated _______ on their success.
questions.explanation: "One another" is appropriate for a group of people. लोगों के एक समूह (दो से अधिक) के लिए "one another" उचित है।

questions.question: Q187. This is the _______ house in the colony.
questions.explanation: "Farthest" refers to the greatest physical distance. भौतिक दूरी में सबसे अधिक के लिए "farthest" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q188. We need no _______ explanation on this topic.
questions.explanation: "Further" means 'additional' or 'extra'. "Further" का अर्थ है 'अतिरिक्त' या 'आगे की'।

questions.question: Q189. Mumbai is _______ from Delhi than Jaipur is.
questions.explanation: "Farther" is used to denote physical distance. भौतिक दूरी बताने के लिए "farther" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q190. Until _______ notice, the office will remain closed.
questions.explanation: "Further notice" is a standard phrase meaning 'until more information is given'. "Further notice" का अर्थ है 'अगली सूचना तक'।

questions.question: Q191. I have _______ money to buy this expensive watch.
questions.explanation: "No" is used as an adjective before a noun like money. "No" का प्रयोग noun से पहले adjective के रूप में किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q192. There is _______ information available at the desk.
questions.explanation: "No" directly modifies the noun information. "No" यहाँ noun 'information' की विशेषता बता रहा है।

questions.question: Q193. She is _______ coming to the party tonight.
questions.explanation: "Not" is an adverb used to make a verb negative. "Not" एक adverb है जो verb को negative बनाने के लिए उपयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q194. It is _______ a difficult task as it seems.
questions.explanation: Use "not" to negate an adjective phrase. Adjective phrase को negative बनाने के लिए "not" का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q195. I have _______ friends in this city.
questions.explanation: Both "no" and "not any" are grammatically correct here. "No" और "not any" दोनों यहाँ व्याकरण के अनुसार सही हैं।

questions.question: Q196. He is _______ more a student here.
questions.explanation: "No more" is a phrase meaning 'not any longer'. "No more" का अर्थ है 'अब और नहीं'।

questions.question: Q197. There are _______ books on the shelf.
questions.explanation: "No" is used to show the absence of things (books). चीजों की अनुपस्थिति दिखाने के लिए "no" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q198. He did _______ see me at the station.
questions.explanation: Use "not" with helping verbs like 'did'. 'Did' जैसे helping verbs के साथ "not" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Q199. I have _______ time for such gossip.
questions.explanation: "No" is the correct determiner for the noun time. "Time" के लिए सही determiner "no" है।

questions.question: Q200. This is _______ my book.
questions.explanation: Use "not" to negate a possessive phrase. Possessive phrase को negative करने के लिए "not" का प्रयोग होता है।
